title: Visual Trapped Chest (Items)
description: Adds a border around trapped chests in the inventory, making them more easily identifiable. Does not affect the placed chests.
body:
This pack aims to be a companion piece to some packs from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/), "Visual Infested Stone (Items)" and "Visual Waxed Copper (Items)", which add a border to a few block items to make them more distinguishable to the player. 

In this pack's case, it does this with trapped chests, adding a red border reminiscent of redstone. The pack does not alter how the block looks when placed however.
